packages.name: @agentskit/adapters
packages.description: Provider adapters for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/angular
packages.description: Angular signals service + headless chat components for AgentsKit — streaming, tools, and memory across any LLM provider.

packages.name: @agentskit/cli
packages.description: CLI for AgentsKit chat and project scaffolding.

packages.name: @agentskit/core
packages.description: Portable AgentsKit runtime for chat orchestration, tools, memory, and retrieval.

packages.name: @agentskit/eval
packages.description: Agent evaluation and benchmarking for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/eval-braintrust
packages.description: Braintrust scoring pipeline for AgentsKit. Quality + robustness scorers, CI regression alerts, and dataset upload helpers.

packages.name: @agentskit/ink
packages.description: Ink terminal components and hooks for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/integrations
packages.description: Unified, plug-and-play service integrations for AgentsKit agents — one descriptor per service projected into tools, connectors, triggers, and auth.

packages.name: @agentskit/mcp
packages.description: Expose AgentsKit tools as an MCP server — use them from Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP host.

packages.name: @agentskit/memory
packages.description: Persistent and vector memory backends for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/observability
packages.description: Logging and tracing layer for AgentsKit agents.

packages.name: @agentskit/observability-langfuse
packages.description: Langfuse tracing adapter for AgentsKit. Spans for plan, tool, model, and HITL gates with token/cost/latency capture.

packages.name: @agentskit/rag
packages.description: Plug-and-play retrieval-augmented generation for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/react
packages.description: React hooks and UI components for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/react-native
packages.description: React Native + Expo hook and headless chat components for AgentsKit — streaming, tools, and memory across any LLM provider.

packages.name: @agentskit/runtime
packages.description: Standalone agent runtime with ReAct loop for AgentsKit.

packages.name: @agentskit/sandbox
packages.description: Secure code execution for AgentsKit agents.

packages.name: @agentskit/skills
packages.description: Ready-made skills (prompts + behavioral instructions) for AgentsKit agents.

packages.name: @agentskit/solid
packages.description: Solid hook + headless chat components for AgentsKit — streaming, tools, and memory across any LLM provider.

packages.name: @agentskit/svelte
packages.description: Svelte 5 store + headless chat components for AgentsKit — streaming, tools, and memory across any LLM provider.

packages.name: @agentskit/templates
packages.description: Extension toolkit for creating custom AgentsKit skills, tools, and adapters.

packages.name: @agentskit/tools
packages.description: Reusable executable tools for AgentsKit agents.

packages.name: @agentskit/validation
packages.description: Opt-in runtime validation of tool-call arguments against their JSON Schema for AgentsKit. Wraps Ajv; plugs into the core ArgsValidator contract (ADR-0008).

packages.name: @agentskit/vue
packages.description: Vue 3 composable + headless chat components for AgentsKit — streaming, tools, and memory across any LLM provider.
